findings.description: Table 1 contains incorrect 2017 values for Hydrilla and Dwarf Milfoil compared with the PDF.
findings.evidence: PDF Table 1 shows Hydrilla: 2014 0%, 2017 0%, 2018 0.5%, 2019 1.5%; and Dwarf Milfoil: 2014 0%, 2017 15%, 2018 20%, 2019 34%. HTML Table 1 shows Hydrilla 2017 as 84% instead of 0%, which appears to shift the Vegetation row's 2019 value into the Hydrilla row.

findings.description: Table 2 contains an incorrect 2017 Hydrilla point count compared with the PDF.
findings.evidence: PDF Table 2 shows Hydrilla counts: 2014 0, 2017 0, 2018 1, 2019 3. HTML Table 2 shows Hydrilla 2017 as 169 instead of 0, which appears to shift the Vegetation 2019 count into the Hydrilla row.

findings.description: A figure caption in HTML changes a numeric value from the PDF, altering meaning.
findings.evidence: PDF caption for Figure 9 reads: 'Figure 9. Dwarf milfoil was found at 40 sample points in 2018.' HTML caption reads: 'Figure 9. Dwarf milfoil was found at 30 sample points in 2018.'

findings.description: Some alt text is less accurate than the visible figure captions because it omits the species/common name formatting used in the document.
findings.evidence: For example, PDF/HTML caption says 'Figure 4. Fontinalis was detected at 12 sample points in 2019.' HTML alt text says 'Map showing Fontinalis detected at 12 sample points in 2019.' This is acceptable but somewhat generic; no clear fabrication found.
